childElements.name: preventiveCareAgreement
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "Rate Details", "allowEdit" : true, "allowNew" : false, "allowDelete" : true, "newLabel" : "New", "editLabel" : "Edit", "deleteLabel" : "Delete", "selectMode" : "Multi", "selectCheckBox" : "selectRate", "svgSprite" : "utility", "svgIcon" : "user", "elementName" : "", "valueSvgMap" : [ ], "selectSobject" : "", "sobjectMapping" : [ ], "sumElement" : "", "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "0", "condition" : "<>", "field" : "ListPCASize" }, { "field" : "TypeOfRate", "condition" : "<>", "data" : "Locum" } ] } }, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "mode" : "Table", "maxDisplay" : 6, "allowClear" : true, "lwcComponentOverride" : "" }

childElements.name: FormulaRateLocum
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "FormulaRateLocum", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "expression" : "CONCATENATE(%preventiveCareAgreementForLocum|n:isSelectRate%,\"-\",%preventiveCareAgreementForLocum|n:RateLocum%)", "hide" : true, "show" : null, "mask" : null, "dataType" : null, "hideGroupSep" : false, "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "disOnTplt" : false }
